race.comment: ANNIHILATE (3) was scintillating late when scorching home from the rear to only miss by a head here two weeks ago. Peaking now and is drawn to take much closer order. Will take plenty of stopping. SCANDALIZE (2) has returned in great order and will only be further improved third-up. Already boasts a win at this trip, so the rise doesn't bother. Holder piloting from the inside also reads favourably. STOKOMO (1) sets up well off two strong runs to open the prep. Is another that should be hitting his straps and is sure to be competitive. ROYAL SCRIPTURE (6) drops in trip from the latest outing when fifth over 1600m at Morphettville, finishing 1.5 lengths off the winner. Can contest for a place.
